steps.title: Page Title
steps.body: This is the main title that appears at the top of the page on your website. Keep it short and clear.

steps.title: Your Page Content Fields
steps.body: These fields control the content that appears on this page. Each field has a label explaining what it's for — fill them in and click Update when you're done.

steps.title: Page Image
steps.body: Click 'Add Image' to upload a new photo, or 'Edit Image' to replace the existing one. Use a landscape photo at least 1200px wide for best results.

steps.title: Save Your Changes
steps.body: When you're happy with your edits, click Update to save and publish them to your live website immediately.
